metadata.name: Variable Rate Seeding Prescription for Soybeans

description: A farmer wants to create a variable rate seeding prescription for a soybean field based on historical yield data and soil type zones.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the last 3 years of yield maps for the specified field.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully retrieves all requested yield maps.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the soil type map for the field.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the correct soil map.

nodes.task_description: Create management zones based on a combination of yield potential and soil type.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a map with 3-5 distinct management zones.

nodes.task_description: Generate a variable rate seeding prescription file compatible with a John Deere planter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a downloadable prescription file in the correct format.
